Noida's Answer to DLF Camellias
Inside the Iconic Jaypee Greens

CRC The Peridona is Jaypee Greens' most exclusive ultra-luxury residential development — and its last. Spread across 6.80 acres inside the iconic Jaypee Greens township, the project comprises 7 premium towers rising to 43 floors with a commanding 160-metre tower height and a sweeping 330-metre grand frontage. With only 341 carefully curated residences, CRC The Peridona achieves the lowest residential density in Delhi NCR.

Every residence is golf-facing by design — not by premium. Configuring from 4,950 sq.ft. to 7,400 sq.ft., each apartment occupies one complete floor. When the elevator doors open, you step directly into your private foyer — not a shared corridor. Designed by Gensler, Killa Design & Rockwell Group — the same names behind the world's most celebrated residences.

About The Project

CRC The Peridona — Greater Noida's Most Coveted Golf Address

CRC The Peridona is the pinnacle of ultra-luxury real estate in Greater Noida — a landmark residential development located inside the prestigious 452-acre Jaypee Greens township on the Yamuna Expressway. Offering exclusively 4 BHK, 4.5 BHK, and 5.5 BHK golf-facing residences starting from 4,950 sq.ft., CRC The Peridona is designed for those who demand the extraordinary. With only 341 homes spread across 7 towers, it represents the scarcest residential inventory in Delhi NCR — making it as much a generational wealth asset as it is a home.

Every residence at CRC The Peridona faces the 152-acre Greg Norman Championship Golf Course on one side and a 60-acre curated nature forest on the other. This dual-view configuration is guaranteed for all 341 units — not just select premium corners. Each apartment occupies one complete floor, and the elevator opens directly into your private foyer. There are no shared corridors, no neighbours on your floor — only pure, uncompromised exclusivity.

Investment Rationale — Why Buy CRC The Peridona Now?

The timing of CRC The Peridona's launch is deliberate. Jewar International Airport — Asia's largest upcoming airport — is just 25 minutes away and is transforming the Yamuna Expressway corridor into NCR's most sought-after address for the next decade. Combined with the absolute scarcity of 341 units in a world-class township and a launch price of ₹13 Cr, buyers are looking at a real estate investment with a rare combination of luxury, livability, and long-term appreciation. Early launch buyers are expected to see 40–60% appreciation by possession.

Design Pedigree — Gensler, Killa Design & Rockwell Group

CRC The Peridona's design credentials are unmatched in India. Gensler — the world's largest architecture firm, currently also designing Godrej Samaris on Golf Course Road, Gurgaon — leads the spatial planning. Killa Design brings its signature biophilic architecture philosophy, and Rockwell Group, renowned for designing luxury hotels and residences globally, handles the interior sensibility. Together, these three firms have created something that has never existed in Greater Noida before — a residence where the architecture is as premium as the golf course outside the window.

To know more about floor plans, payment plans, and exclusive pricing, connect with our expert advisors at Property Saraansh — Noida's most trusted real estate education and consultancy platform. Call or WhatsApp: 9999135369.

FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the price of CRC The Peridona?+
CRC The Peridona price starts from ₹14.85 Crore for the 4 BHK Signature (4,950 sq.ft.). 4.5 BHK Epic is ₹22.40 Cr and 5.5 BHK Sky Mansion is ₹25.90 Cr. Prices W.E.F. 01.03.2026.
Where is CRC The Peridona located?+
CRC The Peridona is located in C-1, Jaypee Greens, Greater Noida — on the Yamuna Expressway. It is 25 minutes from the upcoming Jewar International Airport and 15 minutes from Noida City Centre via metro and expressway.
How many apartments are available in CRC The Peridona?+
Only 341 exclusive residences across 7 premium towers. This exceptionally low density — just 48–49 units per tower — is what makes CRC The Peridona the rarest residential offering in Delhi NCR. Units are being allocated on a first-come basis.
What is the RERA number for CRC The Peridona?+
CRC The Peridona is RERA registered under number UPRERAPRJ298067/05/2025 with the Uttar Pradesh Real Estate Regulatory Authority. You can verify the project at https://www.up-rera.in/projects.
Is CRC The Peridona a good investment?+
CRC The Peridona offers a rare convergence of investment-grade factors: ultra-low inventory (341 units), the last premium land parcel in Jaypee Greens, dual views of a 152-acre championship golf course and 60-acre forest, and proximity to Jewar International Airport (25 min). It is widely compared to DLF Camellias as Noida's ultra-luxury benchmark.
What are the apartment sizes in CRC The Peridona?+
CRC The Peridona offers three configurations: 4 BHK Signature (4,950–6,000 sq.ft.), 4.5 BHK Epic (approx. 6,000 sq.ft.), and 5.5 BHK Epic Sky Mansion (6,400–7,400 sq.ft.). All units occupy one complete floor with private elevator foyers — no shared corridors.
